smg.text: Cloudy apart from sunny periods. Force 4 to 5 south to southwesterly winds with gusts.
Cloudy. Occasional showers, heavy at times. Occasional thunderstorms. Force 3 to 4 southwesterly winds, becoming northerlies with gusts.
Temperature falling slightly. Cloudy. Showers. A few thunderstorms. Force 3 to 4 north to northeasterly winds with gusts.
Mainly cloudy. A few showers. A few thunderstorms at first. Force 3 to 4 east to northeasterly winds with gusts.
Cloudy apart from sunny intervals. One or two showers. Force 3 to 4 easterly winds.
Mainly cloudy. A few showers. Force 2 to 3 east to southeasterly winds.
Mainly cloudy. Occasional showers. Possible thunderstorms. Force 2 to 3 southeasterly winds.
